evals.query: 帮我把这个 PRD 拆成可执行的任务，用 Codex 并行开发
evals.rationale: Direct explicit request for task decomposition + Codex dispatch

evals.query: I have a large feature spec in docs/feature-auth.md — can you break it down into smaller tasks and run them in parallel?
evals.rationale: Implicit task decomposition + parallel orchestration, no explicit Codex mention

evals.query: 用 Claude 来拆任务编排，架构设计用 Claude，具体实现用 Codex
evals.rationale: Mixed engine orchestration, mentions both engines + task decomposition

evals.query: 我需要一个监督模式，把需求分解给多个 Agent 执行，完成后自动评估质量
evals.rationale: Supervised mode + multi-agent execution + quality gate — core orchestration use case

evals.query: dispatch.mjs 跑完了，帮我检查一下 status.txt 看看进度
evals.rationale: Reference to dispatch.mjs status polling — direct skill artifact usage

evals.query: Run a long supervision loop that keeps dispatching follow-up tasks until all acceptance criteria pass
evals.rationale: Long-lived supervision loop with follow-up batches

evals.query: create task specs for 5 Codex sessions from this requirements doc and run them sequentially
evals.rationale: Create task specs + dispatch — exact skill use case

evals.query: 把任务按 DAG 依赖关系编排，先跑基础设施再跑业务功能
evals.rationale: DAG-based task orchestration with dependency ordering

evals.query: 分解需求给 Agent 执行，一些基础任务用 Codex 跑，复杂架构任务用 Claude Code
evals.rationale: Mixed engine + task decomposition + explicit Agent roles

evals.query: let's brainstorm about the best approach for our authentication system, get 3 different AI perspectives on it
evals.rationale: Multi-agent brainstorming → agent-brainstorm skill, not task orchestration

evals.query: 帮我建 3 个飞书任务，分别是前端开发、后端 API、数据库迁移
evals.rationale: Creating Feishu tasks → feishu-integration skill, not task decomposition/orchestration

evals.query: review this pull request and suggest improvements to the code quality
evals.rationale: Code review request, no task decomposition or orchestration

evals.query: 让几个 Agent 从不同角度讨论一下这个技术方案的优劣
evals.rationale: Multi-agent discussion/debate → agent-brainstorm, not orchestration

evals.query: I want to deploy my Next.js app to Vercel and set up CI/CD
evals.rationale: Deployment task, not PRD decomposition or multi-agent orchestration

evals.query: generate a Mermaid flowchart showing the task dependency tree for sprint 4
evals.rationale: Mermaid diagram → pm-toolkit, the mention of 'task' is coincidental

evals.query: 帮我用 Codex 写一个 Python 脚本来处理 CSV 数据
evals.rationale: Single Codex task, not decomposition/orchestration — should use Codex directly

evals.query: 读取 Coding.net 上的 CI 构建日志，看看最近一次构建是否通过
evals.rationale: Coding.net CI → coding-net skill, mentions build but not task orchestration

evals.query: help me set up a supervised workflow where Codex handles each module independently and I review the results
evals.rationale: Supervised workflow with modular independence — core orchestration pattern

evals.query: 我要设计一个前端页面原型，包括登录、注册、仪表盘三个页面
evals.rationale: Front-end design → agent-front-design skill, not task orchestration

evals.query: 长时间调度模式，在后台持续监控 Agent 执行进度，自动处理失败任务
evals.rationale: Long-running supervision + auto-retry — exact trigger phrase
